ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "medication_class" TEXT /* Classification of the medication */,
  "interaction_warning" TEXT /* Potential interaction warnings for the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "patient_medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-medication association */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the patient's medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "TSH_measured" TEXT /* TSH measurement status */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH test result */,
  "T3_measured" TEXT /* T3 measurement status */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 test result */,
  "TT4_measured" TEXT /* TT4 measurement status */,
  "TT4" REAL /* TT4 test result */,
  "T4U_measured" TEXT /* T4U measurement status */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U test result */,
  "FTI_measured" TEXT /* FTI measurement status */,
  "FTI" REAL /* FTI test result */,
  "TBG_measured" TEXT /* TBG measurement status */,
  "free_T4_measured" TEXT /* Free T4 measurement status */,
  "free_T4" REAL /* Free T4 test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the test results by a healthcare provider */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referral_sources" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral source */,
  "referral_name" TEXT /* Name of the referral source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the referral source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_outcome_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the treatment outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the patient's condition */,
  "condition_management_plan" TEXT /* Plan for managing the patient's condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the medication administration event */,
  "patient_medication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient_medications table */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was administered */,
  "administration_dose" TEXT /* Dose of medication administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_administration_patient_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_medication_id") REFERENCES patient_medications ("patient_medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test request */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_requested" TEXT /* Type of test requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was requested */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)
